title: Sir Peter Westmacott on Office Hours
summary: Sir Peter Westmacott (@PeterWestmacott), former British Ambassador to the United States and Belfer Center Senior Fellow, talks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about life as an Ambassador, the British embassy in Washington, D.C., and U.S.-U.K. relations.
body: Sir Peter Westmacott (@PeterWestmacott), former British Ambassador to the United States and Belfer Center Senior Fellow, talks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about life as an Ambassador, the British embassy in Washington, D.C., and U.S.-U.K. relations. The latest from Belfer See more Gallery 1 of 5 Sir Peter Westmacott: What’s It Really Like to Live in an Embassy? 2 of 5 Sir Peter Westmacott: An Ambassador’s Must-Have Qualities 3 of 5 Sir Peter Westmacott: #SocialMediaDiplomacy 4 of 5 Sir Peter Westmacott: Asleep... or Deep in Thought? 5 of 5 Sir Peter Westmacott: Differences of a Common Language Sir Peter Westmacott served as British Ambassador to the United States from January 2012 to January 2016. Prior to his position as Ambassador to the United States, Westmacott served as Ambassador to France from 2007-2012, and Ambassador to Turkey from 2002-2006. Westmacott’s 40 year career in the British Diplomatic Service has also included four years in Iran (before the Revolution) and an interim deployment to the European Commission in Brussels. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: In this interview, former British Ambassador to the United States Sir Peter Westmacott discusses his experiences and insights from a distinguished diplomatic career spanning over four decades. The conversation covers the realities of life within an embassy, the essential qualities required for an ambassador, and the nuances of U.S.-U.K. relations. Westmacott, who also served as Ambassador to France and Turkey, reflects on his tenure in Washington D.C. from 2012 to 2016, touching upon the practical aspects of diplomatic service and the evolving nature of international engagement, including the role of social media in modern diplomacy. The discussion provides a personal perspective on the challenges and dynamics of maintaining the special relationship between the two nations.
result.main_content_zh: 本文是对英国前驻美大使彼得·韦斯特麦克特爵士的访谈摘录，内容基于其四十余年的外交生涯。访谈探讨了驻外大使馆内的真实生活、一名大使所必备的核心素质，以及英美双边关系的具体内涵。韦斯特麦克特爵士曾先后担任英国驻法国和土耳其大使，并于2012年至2016年间出任驻美大使。他在对话中分享了在华盛顿特区工作的亲身经历，反思了外交服务的实际运作，并谈及现代外交中社交媒体所扮演的角色。此次交流从个人视角揭示了维护英美特殊关系所面临的挑战与动态，提供了对高级别外交实践的内部观察。
